{"step_by_step_thinking": "At day 3 of presentation, the most reliable and commonly used investigation for dengue is NS1 antigen detection. While viral culture and isolation in C6/36 cell line and ELISA for antibody against dengue virus are acceptable, they are less useful at this early stage. NS1 antigen detection is particularly useful in the early phase of the disease, making it the most appropriate choice at day 3.", "answer_choice": "A"}
